title: PHILOMATH COMMUNITY SERVICES - 211info
text: PHILOMATH COMMUNITY SERVICES PHILOMATH COMMUNITY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a shopping-style food pantry once per month. Gleaning program distributes gleaned surplus food weekly. Provides a children's clothing closet and diapers. Also offers a community garden and gardening instruction to community members. Donations and volunteers welcome. 360 S 9th Street Philomath, OR 97370 Eligibility: 300% of the Area Median Income June's Kids Kloset: Ages 0-17 Hours: Food pantry: Tuesday 4:30pm-7:30pm, Thursday 9am-noon, 3rd Saturday of the month 12:30pm-3:30pm Gleaning program distribution: Varies June's Kids Kloset: Tuesday 4:30pm-7:30pm, Thursday 9am-noon, 3rd Saturday of the month 12:30pm-3:30pm Lupe's Community Garden: Open seasonally If Philomath Schools are closed due to weather, the food pantry and June's Kids Kloset will be closed as well. Email (541) 929-2499 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 929-2499 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information. Visit website to confirm hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On South 9th Street off Applegate Street Services: Children's Clothing Community Gardening Diapers Food Gleaning Programs Food Pantries If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
